subject: [PATCH v3 2/4] memcg: uint16_t for nr_bytes in obj_stock_pcp

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch modifies the memcg kernel module to use a 16-bit unsigned integer (uint16_t) to store the number of bytes in the obj_stock_pcp structure, instead of a 32-bit unsigned integer. This change is made to reduce memory usage on 64-bit architectures where the per-CPU cache is limited to a single cache line. The patch also includes special handling for architectures with 256KiB base pages, which cannot fit the sub-page remainder in a uint16_t. The change affects only the obj_stock_pcp structure and does not impact other parts of the kernel.
